data.title: test-batched.sh runner: harvest-worktree + merge-to-main tests fail under batch but pass standalone (shared state pollution)
data.description: test_complete_comment_written_on_success and test_complete_comment_written_on_failure in test-harvest-worktree.sh: FAILED 4 under batched runner, PASSED 39 standalone. test-merge-to-main-auto-resolve.sh, test-merge-to-main-cleanliness.sh, test-merge-to-main-portability.sh also fail batched/pass standalone. Root cause: likely shared git/ticket/branch state pollution between tests in batched execution. Blocks commits for f6c6-362c, d888-632b, a44a-0f63.
